model.name: convertVariableTo
model.title: Convert Variable To
model.description: Converts the variable to another type
model.label: eip,transformation

id.description: Sets the id of this node. Important: If you want to set the id of the route, then you must use routeId(String) instead.

note.description: Sets the note of this node

description.description: Sets the description of this node

disabled.label: advanced
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

name.description: Name of variable to convert its value. The simple language can be used to define a dynamic evaluated variable name.

type.description: The java type to convert to.

toName.description: To use another variable to store the result. By default, the result is stored in the same variable.

mandatory.label: advanced
mandatory.description: Whether the conversion is mandatory. If mandatory and conversion is not possible, a NoTypeConversionAvailableException is thrown. Setting this to false means null may be returned if conversion is not possible.

charset.label: advanced
charset.description: To use a specific charset when converting.
